com.csl.intercom.broker - package com.csl.intercom.broker
This package contains the tools for the MQTT protocol.
com.csl.intercom.cslscan - package com.csl.intercom.cslscan
This package contains the handlers, models and enumerations for the CSL-SCAN module

com.csl.intercom.cslscan.models - package com.csl.intercom.cslscan.models

com.csl.intercom.dbapi - package com.csl.intercom.dbapi
This package contains the handlers, models and enumerations for the DB-API module

This package contains the tools for the json commands and the helpers for the service loaders

This package contains some tools fo the synchronisation of the DB.

connectToServer() - Static method in class main.CSLIDSMainClient
Connects to the server at (serverUrl/cmd) TCP Socket, and maps the received commands over socket to the specific registered service The messages received from the server are expected to follow the following format: { api: , jcmd: { cmd: , params: { ... } } } NOTE that each message is handled by a new thread
connectToServer() - Static method in class main.xcom.CSLIDSMainRemote

CPENameBinder - Class in lib.unpacked.org.mitre.cpe.naming
The CPENameBinder class is a simple implementation of the CPE Name binding algorithm, as specified in the CPE Naming Standard version 2.3.

CPENameMatcher - Class in lib.unpacked.org.mitre.cpe.matching
The CPENameMatcher is an implementation of the CPE Matching algorithm, as specified in the CPE Matching Standard version 2.3.

CPENameUnbinder - Class in lib.unpacked.org.mitre.cpe.naming
The CPENameUnBinder class is a simple implementation of the CPE Name unbinding algorithm, as specified in the CPE Naming Standard version 2.3.

CSLUdpUnicastClient - Class in com.csl.udp
Class for a UDP client that listens to the given ip address and port, and adds the received message into the messageQueue to be treated later.
CSLUdpUnicastClient(String, int, BlockingQueue<byte[]>, boolean) - Constructor for class com.csl.udp.CSLUdpUnicastClient
Client UDP that listens to the given ip address and port, and adds the received message into the messageQueue.
